sensitive_family_notes: Not a sensitive family (model_family=sherpa-onnx, not MiLMMT/Gemma-derived). T-one Russian streaming CTC is licensed Apache-2.0 (upstream github.com/voicekit-team/T-one and the sherpa-onnx redistribution), which permits commercial use and redistribution. Distributed via first-run download to the device, not bundled in the APK; on-device ASR performs no network upload of audio, so the privacy impact is local-only inference. App-store policy: model weights downloaded at runtime under a permissive OSI license, no restricted content.
license_summary: Apache License 2.0 — commercial use OK, redistribution OK, modification OK, patent grant included. No copyleft, no field-of-use restriction.
privacy_decision: On-device inference; captured audio is not transmitted off-device by the ASR path. Approved.
app_store_decision: Runtime download of permissively-licensed ONNX weights is consistent with app-store policies. Approved.
